description: Control a WalkingPad treadmill over Bluetooth LE: start and stop the belt, set speed, stream live telemetry, and record walks to a local history store.

novel_features.name: Local walk history
novel_features.description: Keep a permanent local record of every walk — distance, steps, time — that survives the belt's power-cut memory loss.

novel_features.name: Streak tracking
novel_features.description: See your current consecutive-day walking streak.

novel_features.name: Daily trends
novel_features.description: Distance, steps, and active minutes per day over a window.

novel_features.name: Calorie estimate
novel_features.description: Estimate calories burned from your body profile — the number the belt refuses to report.

novel_features.name: Family-generic discovery
novel_features.description: Find any compatible WalkingPad by its BLE service, not its name.
